Extend Find quiz reveal: lines on Stars Only, artwork on Diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: unified plant database, scheduling display, and seed autocomplete (#48)

* fix: journal page container width, entry spacing, and scroll box

Constrain the journal feed to max-w-3xl to match the header area,
increase entry row height to prevent overlap between cards, and skip
react-window virtualization for small lists to avoid an unnecessary
scroll container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add unified plant database design plan

Merges CropDB (scheduling) and PlantKB (ecology/care) into a single
plant data source with an optional scheduling extension block. Covers
schema, data migration, service layer, consumer migration, seed form
autocomplete, and knowledge page updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: merge CropDB into PlantKB as unified plant database

Consolidates two separate plant data sources (CropDB and PlantKB) into a
single unified PlantKnowledge model with an optional scheduling extension.
This eliminates data duplication, resolves conflicting crop lists across
features, and simplifies the data layer.

Schema: add cropGroup (required), family (optional), and scheduling block
(optional) to plantKnowledgeSchema. Data: merge 75 PlantKB entries with
CropDB varieties to produce 137 unified entries (73 with scheduling data).
Service layer: add crop group queries, schedulable plant search via
MiniSearch, and SchedulablePlant type. Migrate all consumers (CropPicker,
VarietySelector, StartingFlowWizard, useScheduling) from CropDB to
knowledge base lookups.

Delete: src/data/cropdb/, cropDBSearch, useCropDB, customCropRepository,
customCrop.schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add scheduling display, related varieties, and seed form autocomplete

KnowledgeDetailPage: display family badge, scheduling info card (planting
method, seeding depth, row spacing, harvest window, succession interval,
bed prep lead, days to transplant, notes), and related varieties section
with links to sibling crop group entries.

SeedFormPage: replace plain Species/Variety inputs with autocomplete
dropdowns powered by the knowledge base. Species search deduplicates by
species and shows common names. Selecting a species populates variety
suggestions from the matched crop group.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update README with PlantKB, calendar, expenses, and seasons features

Add missing features to the README that were built in recent releases:
Plant Knowledge Base, Planting Calendar, Expense Tracking, and
year-over-year Season Comparison. Also update the architecture section
to reflect the knowledgeBase service and built-in plant data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Expose each @cocotb.test() as an individual pytest item

discover_cocotb_tests() introspects the test module for
cocotb._decorators.Test instances and parametrizes test_gcd() over them.
The simulation is built once per session via a fixture.

commit.message:
feat: wire --image flag for direct E01/raw disk image processing

Add --image/-i CLI flag that opens E01 or raw disk images directly,
extracts all four NTFS artifacts ($MFT, $MFTMirr, $LogFile, $UsnJrnl:$J),
and feeds them through the full analysis pipeline automatically.

- --image conflicts with --journal/--mft/--mftmirr/--logfile (one mode or the other)
- --output-dir controls where extracted artifacts are saved (defaults to temp dir)
- Without the 'image' feature, --image gives a clear error with rebuild instructions
- Move tempfile from dev-dependency to regular dependency
- Update README with E01 usage examples, architecture diagram, and feature comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: usnjrnl-forensic
repository.description: The most comprehensive NTFS USN Journal parser: full path reconstruction (CyberCX Rewind), TriForce correlation (MFT + LogFile + UsnJrnl), ghost record recovery, anti-forensics detection, timestomping detection, USN carving, and more.

commit.message:
Fix future-date odds: remove Odds API date filter

NBA games tip off 7-11 PM ET = midnight-4 AM UTC next day, so a
commenceTimeFrom/To UTC window silently excluded them. Now fetches
all upcoming/live games from The Odds API (no date filter) and
matches to ESPN games by home team name. Past dates skip the API
call entirely and fall back to model projections.

commit.message:
feat: Upgrade embedding model to gte-Qwen2-1.5B-instruct (#33)

* feat: Upgrade embedding model to gte-Qwen2-1.5B-instruct

Switch from mixedbread-ai/mxbai-embed-large-v1 (1024-dim) to
Alibaba-NLP/gte-Qwen2-1.5B-instruct (1536-dim) for improved
retrieval quality (~2.5 points higher on MTEB benchmarks).

Changes:
- Pin transformers>=4.40,<5 (5.x breaks Qwen2 custom code)
- Remove trust_remote_code (native Qwen2 support in transformers 4.x)
- Strip base64 images before chunking to prevent OOM in 1.5B model

All three ChromaDB collections (vault, people, slack) were cleared
and re-embedded with the new model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Address PR review — stale comment and missing tests

- Remove stale trust_remote_code reference from embeddings.py comment
- Add unit tests for _strip_base64_images (6 tests covering single/
  multiple images, passthrough, and chunk_document integration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

without User-Agent header (cloud-to-cloud), causing "Unexpected end of JSON"

feat(messages): add --since-utc flag to filter messages by date

with --limit so both constraints apply simultaneously.

commit.message:
feat: add 63-bar max holding days cap to evaluator

Force-exit positions after max_holding_days bars (default 63, ~90
calendar days) to prevent "hold forever" strategies that game the
fitness function by never exiting.

- Add max_holding_days to EvaluatorConfig (0 = disabled)
- Extract _ExitLevels dataclass and _compute_exit_levels() helper
- Widen genome max_days range from 1-30 to 5-90 in strategy.yaml

feat(task-376): 战术驾驶舱全链路闭环 — 双Feeder架构+三路ZMQ+Prometheus 6/6品种

[F1] .env: 新增 FEEDER_WS_FEED=forex + FEEDER_SYMBOLS=EURUSD,GBPUSD (明确 forex feeder 订阅)
[F2] .env.crypto-feeder: 新建 Crypto Feeder 配置 (FEEDER_WS_FEED=crypto / ETH-USD,SOL-USD,XRP-USD / Port 5559)
[F3] /etc/systemd/system/mt5-crs-feeder-crypto.service: 新建 systemd 服务 (enabled + running)
[F4] launch_dual_track.py: 三路 ZMQ SUB Poller (Port5556+5557+5559)
[F5] _EODHD_CRYPTO_SYMBOL_MAP: ETH-USD→ETHUSD.s / SOL-USD→SOLUSD.s / XRP-USD→XRPUSD.s / BTC-USD→BTCUSD.s
[F6] _normalize_feeder_tick: 优先查映射表(crypto)，未命中追加.s(forex)；isinstance防御校验

验证: Prometheus mt5_tick_bid 6/6品种全量激活 (旧状态: 2/6)
测试: 8/8 归一化测试 PASS; audit_pass (Tri-Brain)

Closes #376

updated to publish root directly to gh-pages with no build step.

commit.message:
Wait indefinitely for human claims — never auto-pass on pong/kong/win

Human players now always get notified of claimable discards and the
game waits for their response. No more 8-second timeout that silently
passes on their behalf. This ensures players never miss a claim
opportunity even when away briefly.

feat(22-01): rate limiting, password policy, error sanitization across all handlers

- Add per-IP rate limiting middleware with auto-cleanup goroutine
- Apply rate limits: login (5/min), signup (3/hr), forgot-password (3/hr), reset-password (3/hr)
- Add password policy (8+ chars, 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 digit) to Signup, ResetPassword, ChangePassword
- Replace all err.Error() in 500-level responses with respondError() across 16 handler files
- Internal Go errors are now logged server-side only, never exposed to clients

fix: strip /api suffix from ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL before constructing API URL

ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL already includes /api, so we need to strip it
to avoid double /api in the request URL (e.g. /api/api/hooks/my-rules).

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Adam optimizer, cosine LR schedule, stronger focal loss, softmax soft mask

- Switch from SGD to Adam optimizer
- Add linear warmup + cosine decay LR schedule
- Increase focal loss alpha (2 -> 4) to penalize missed heatmap spots
- Apply softmax over spatial dims for regression soft mask
- Add src/runs/ to .gitignore
